title: Pentaphyllum glabrellum
taxonomy: Pentaphyllum glabrellum is classified within the family Celastraceae. This family is commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. The plant is native to China and is part of the genus Pentaphyllum, which is a small group of flowering plants. The classification of Pentaphyllum glabrellum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Its classification reflects its relationship with other flowering plants and its unique characteristics within the Celastraceae family.
